hooks.prompt: Check the last assistant message. ONLY if it contains a project generation summary (phrases like 'Project created:', 'scaffold complete', 'Next steps:', or a project path like '~/claude/<name>/'), remind the user to cd into the project directory and start a new Claude session there, and confirm the project was added to the registry. If the last message is about setup, answering questions, planning, or anything other than a completed project generation, respond with exactly: 'No action needed.'
